title: Commit window opened for Doctor Phase 2 report mode
body: Opened git:index/head claim 8BD2232D-2E71-4C4E-B08E-39DC72906718 to stage and commit the Doctor Phase 2 read-only report-mode bundle. Staged set is currently empty; commit subject draft is feat(agent-tools): add practice substrate report mode; peer commit queue has no active entries.
